modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't figure out how to enable grammar and style in Microsoft Editor.

full_description_text: So, I'm trying to use Microsoft Editor in Outlook and Word. I just wanna turn on the grammar and style stuff. But I can't find where to do it. It's kinda frustrating, you know?
short_description: Can't figure out how to enable grammar and style in Microsoft Editor.
description: So, I'm trying to use Microsoft Editor in Outlook and Word. I just wanna turn on the grammar and style stuff. But I can't find where to do it. It's kinda frustrating, you know?
